data.name: Elf World Adventure 8
data.detailed_description:
GAMEPLAY:



Elf World Adventure 8 is the next chapter in the popular H-puzzle series in anime and fantasy style, offering many new levels with charming elf girls. Solve erotic puzzles and enjoy the enchanting atmosphere of a magical world.

This installment will please you with rich visuals, relaxing music, and new characters you won’t forget. With simple controls and an intuitive interface, it's everything you need for a perfect evening!

FEATURES:



  • Hentai Gameplay: Engaging puzzles with erotic scenes.
  • Anime Fantasy Style: A magical world and beautiful elf girls.
  • Chill Atmosphere: Melodic music and a calm game pace.
  • Easy Controls: Accessible for all types of players.
  • Many Levels: More puzzles, more fun!

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 保加利亞文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 匈牙利文, 越南文, 丹麥文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 簡體中文, 韓文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 俄文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 瑞典文, 日文, 義大利文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-2300
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 760 or Radeon HD 7850
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-7400 or AMD Ryzen 3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce RTX 3060
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 音效卡: DirectX

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-2300
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GeForce GTX 760 or Radeon HD 7850
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-7400 or AMD Ryzen 3
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GeForce RTX 3060
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Sound Card: DirectX
